content: Hello everyone. Thank you in advance for your answers. Lately, it has become more and more difficult to play the game. I'm struggling to clear Alert 3, P-Dive V and even the current event stages. I'm in the beginning of Chapter 9, level 54, and I can't really decide even on 1 permanent team. I just got the E3 GMurphy, however, it's hard for me to play her and I'm dying all the time. I have Kath E3 and it plays pretty well with Castor overall, but I want to split these characters into two different teams for D-tide (because Castor will be E3 soon using the free dupes). I will be grateful for any advice about possible teams for any content (Story/D-tide). I also have ~360 pulls + Origin of Time and I don't know where to spend them at all.
I really like Clem's design so I decided to go all the way to OE. Wondering what kind of late game teams a heavily invested clem goes into so I know what to work towards.
